# ItemDefinition.ItemTypeSnoId property

The item's base-type SNO id (payload `+0x0C`) — the [`ItemType`](../ItemType.md) (group ItemType = 98) that classifies this item as a weapon / armor / jewelry / charm. Resolve it with [`ReadItemType`](../Diablo4Storage/ReadItemType.md). `0` when the record has none (§13 / LIB-1).

```csharp
public int ItemTypeSnoId { get; }
```
